sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 42:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 42:1
items.html: There is the Keter of Nekudim here, where the light of Ozen itself, which is the phase of male, has phase two of clothing, which is the phase of GE of the Rosh of Nekudim. There is also the phase of HB, which are the phase of AHP that went outside and became HGT, although they are the phase of Rosh at their root. After that there is the phase of the actual Guf of Nekudim, which is ZAT. There are two phases there, too: HGT, which are regarded as GAR of VAK, and NHY, which are the ZON of VAK. (Inner Light, Item 26)
